name: RC Seeds / LSA

dosing: Standard Rivea Corymbosa (RC) seed dose is 30-50 seeds, with 15-25 seeds as a starting dose for first-timers
Hawaiian Baby Woodrose (HBWR) seeds are much stronger at 2-4 seeds for a standard dose, up to 6-8 seeds for experienced users
Higher RC seed doses of 100-200 seeds are occasionally used for stubborn cycles but are less common
preparations: Crush or grind seeds with a mortar and pestle, then soak in water for 1-4 hours before straining and drinking the liquid
Adding lemon juice to the soak water may improve extraction and reduce nausea
Some users drink the seed sludge along with the liquid, though straining it out is easier on the stomach
schedule: Dose every 5 days, with a minimum 5-day detox from triptans before the first dose
Most users need 2-3 doses to break a cycle, typically taken in the evening or at bedtime
Maintenance dosing every 2-6 months during remission can help prevent new cycles

sideEffects: Mild psychoactive effects such as relaxed mood and brighter colors
